text_block_list.text:
My own chapter in the history of Team Sirius began with only Mejiro 
McQueen at my side.

Her incredible ability to capture hearts and minds has been the crux 
of our team's growth.

But with every person she inspired, the weight of their expectations 
grew heavier.
Pant, pant… McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This reminds me — something similar happened before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Just when I was about to break down, you came running after me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I suppose what happens next will be no different as well.

It's all I can do. There is just so much I have yet to figure out as a 
trainer…

It's all I can do. There is just so much I have yet to figure out as a 
trainer…

I didn't even realize that my hopes for you were turning into obstacles 
in your path.

I didn't even realize that my hopes for you were turning into obstacles 
in your path.

But it's not just that we expect a lot from you… You've inspired 
everyone on Team Sirius.

But it's not just that we expect a lot from you… You've inspired 
everyone on Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How can you find inspiration in someone who can't even run according 
to race rules?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Someone who has caused so much nuisance toward my fellow racers, 
and even my trainer?
Because we have faith in you.
Because we have faith in you.
No matter how many mistakes trip you up along the way…
No matter how many mistakes trip you up along the way…
You'll keep going, and we'll keep cheering.
You'll keep going, and we'll keep cheering.
We believe in you, and that's not changing just because of a bad race or two!
We believe in you, and that's not changing just because of a bad race or two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer…

Remember what they said about Oguri? That she couldn't win 
anymore?
But everyone on the team supported Oguri right until the very end.
But everyone on the team supported Oguri right until the very end.

No matter the results, she went into every race determined to make us 
proud — and that's what made her our ace.

No matter the results, she went into every race determined to make us 
proud — and that's what made her our ace.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: An "ace"… Someone the team takes pride in, win or lose…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Have I… really become such a horsegirl in the eyes of others?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Am I really their ace? Am I inspiring everyone to chase their dreams?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hic… Ah… Waaaugh!

Mejiro McQueen breaks into tears, releasing all of the pressure that 
had built up within her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um… I've returned.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Welcome back, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What would Grandmother think if she knew that one of her precious 
ladies was spending her time out late at night?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: We were worried about you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not only did I fail to win today's race, but I also caused you all to 
worry so much. I'm not sure what to say…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey now, that's so not the point! No more gloomy words from you, missy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: H-Hey! What on — what are you doing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've got somethin' to say, right? People hear you better when you 
speak from on high, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I-I…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm going to go back out there and run, my head held high!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I might lose again, and I might even cry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But despite that, I will shoulder your hopes and keep running — as your 
team's ace!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You go, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: I'm always, always going to believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Let's go, ace!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You know, that was pretty cool, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Black Bob-cut
text_block_list.text: Let's keep running together for as long as we can!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you figured out how to turn those expectations into 
strength, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: G-Geez, I've said everything on my mind. You can let me down now!

The laughs coming from the training staff room continue to echo 
through the halls late into the night.
One month later…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew…

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: Aahhh… I'm getting all nervous!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Yeah, why does it feel like this when it's not even our race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That's because you see some of your own hopes and dreams in me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And that is exactly what is going to propel me forward today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Get out there and snatch that Grand Prix Horsegirl title, 
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll be back soon!

One year ago, Oguri Cap made a miracle happen at the Arima Kinen. 
And today, we stand ready to make our mark at the very same race.

One year ago, Oguri Cap made a miracle happen at the Arima Kinen. 
And today, we stand ready to make our mark at the very same race.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the year's final major bout, the Arima Kinen! The race is 
about to start!
